# cursor-board-gen (Antigravity)

Generate design boards from chat via Cursor **GenerateImage** + prompt SSOT.

```
/cursor-board-gen dj-directory-main
/cursor-board-gen next --wave=3
```

MCP: `cursor-board-gen` · CLI: `npx tsx scripts/cursor-board-gen.mts instruct <id>`

Registry: `atl-table-booking-app/docs/prompts/board-prompts/BOARD-PROMPT-REGISTRY.md`
